steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: ”Conversely” marks a direct contrast between “historically significant” and the blank. We need the opposite of significance.

steps.title: Match the opposite meaning
steps.content:
”Inconsequential” directly opposes “historically significant” by denoting lack of importance.

The other choices either describe unrelated attributes (benevolent = kind, genuine = authentic) or paradoxically reinforce rather than oppose the original (momentous emphasizes importance).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
